missing_articles.title: Our New Presidency and General Board

notes: The extraction has several issues with content bleeding between articles and one major missing article. The 'Our New Presidency and General Board' article (pages 378-401 in the OCR) is completely missing from the extracted files. The Guide Lessons file appears to be corrupted with mixed content from different sections.
